summary: Implemented ATM-GOV-0258 MVP slice for non-delivery WIP commit and dirty-release recovery unblocking 0256 and 0257 (Ref: ATM-BUG-2026-07-22-229).
mvpDeliverables: tasks release fail-close with ATM_RELEASE_DIRTY_WIP_BLOCKED when in-scope source WIP is dirty
tasks release recoveryCommand choices: finish-and-close, non-delivery WIP commit-and-release, discard-and-release
tasks release --wip-commit / git commit --wip governed non-delivery WIP commit path with trailers (ATM-WIP: true, ATM-Delivery: false, ATM-Closeout-Eligible: false)
pre-commit hook WIP commit validator bypass (bypassing full repo typecheck while preserving scope, identity, lane, index, and protected-state checks)
tasks release --discard-wip with auditable discard receipt (.atm/history/evidence/<task>.discard-wip-receipt.json)
assertClaimDirtyWipAdmission recoveryCommand details when blocked by foreign/unowned dirty WIP
